visual_strategy: Warm, appetizing and calm — the visual language of a balanced meal, not a diet app. Spice-warm hues grounded by fresh green and generous cream, so it feels nourishing and effortless rather than clinical.

primary.psychology: Warmth, appetite and the golden spice heart of Indian food; signals nourishment and energy without shouting, and carries the 'rasa' of taste.

secondary.psychology: Balance, health and freshness; grounds the warm primary so the brand reads nourishing and honest rather than indulgent.

accent.psychology: Appetite and a decisive, tap-worthy call to action; used sparingly for confirm moments and highlights.

typography.header: A warm humanist sans (e.g., General Sans / Satoshi) at medium weight — confident and modern, never corporate-cold.
typography.body: A highly legible neutral sans (e.g., Inter) for menus, macros and numbers at small sizes on mobile.
typography.data: A tabular-figure sans or mono for calories, macros, prices and the spend ledger, so numbers align and read at a glance.

logo_guidelines.placement: Top-left in app and marketing; centered on splash and the plan-approval hero.
logo_guidelines.clear_space: Minimum clear space equal to the height of the 'R' on all sides.
logo_guidelines.constraints: Never stretch, never add a drop shadow, never place the warm mark on a busy food photo without a scrim.

imagery_art_direction.photography: Real, warm, top-down and close-up food on cream or wood; natural light, honest portions, no glossy fast-food gloss or artificial garnish.
imagery_art_direction.illustration: Simple line-and-fill food and bowl motifs in the palette; friendly, geometric, never cartoonish.
imagery_art_direction.environments: Everyday Indian home and desk contexts — a meal arriving between meetings — not aspirational studio kitchens.

graphic_elements.shapes: Soft rounded rectangles and full circles echoing plates, bowls and the 'tap' target; generous corner radii.
graphic_elements.textures: Matte, flat surfaces with warm cream backgrounds; subtle paper-grain at most, no gradients or gloss.
graphic_elements.patterns: A light repeating motif of bowls / spice dots used as a quiet background texture, never over content.
